creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to PauAmma from comment #2)
I'm not sure what "counterproductive" means here? And is there a survey running currently?

BTW, my main point is, it is nice that the document covers all the things available in the system, if that's less-useful or in the processing of deprecating, we can add some information around the content, or moving to appendix.  Even the content is only useful to very few people, it's still worth to keep it, as long as it's already there and correct.  Of course it should not effect the readability so we can consider reorg the content.
